CHAPTER 1—PRELIMINARY Short title Clause1. This Act may be cited as the Lands Legislation Amendment Act 1992. Commencement Clause2.
This Act (other than section 4) commences on a day to be fixed by proclamation. Amended Acts Clause3. Each Act mentioned in Schedule | is amended as set out in the Schedule.
